narrative:
Franklin / Conesville / Virginia (precinct in Coshocton County) has 1,131 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.8 percentage points.
